ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "width" TEXT /* Width of the product in inches */,
  "depth" TEXT /* Depth of the product in inches */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the product in inches */,
  "thickness" TEXT /* Thickness of the product in inches */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., Locker Room Bench) */,
  "mounting_style" TEXT /* Mounting style of the product (e.g., Bolt Down) */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Type of material used (e.g., wood, metal) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product in pounds or kilograms */,
  "production_cost" TEXT /* Cost of producing the product */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer who created the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period in months */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the product is active (for sale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designers" (
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the designer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the designer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the designer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the designer was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the designer's information was last updated */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designer's role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the designer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_designers_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_available" INTEGER /* Number of units available in stock */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock (e.g., Warehouse A) */,
  "last_stock_update" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when the stock level falls below the reorder level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the inventory record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipped_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address where the order will be shipped */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., FedEx, UPS) */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the order is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the customer is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order associated with the sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale occurred */,
  "sale_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sale was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sale was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the sale is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Designer, Sales, Manager) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
